commands: mkdir -p packages/sub-project && echo '{"name": "sub-project", "dependencies": { "testnpm2": "1.0.0" }}' > packages/sub-project/package.json # create sub project and package.json
vp install --no-frozen-lockfile # install again should work and without cache
mkdir -p others/other && echo '{"name": "other", "dependencies": { "testnpm2": "1.0.0" }}' > others/other/package.json # create non workspace project
vp install --no-frozen-lockfile # should install cache hit
ls others/other/node_modules/testnpm2 && exit 1 || true # check testnpm2 is not installed
vp install --no-frozen-lockfile # should install again without cache
